proves: Existing RBench/RWork canonical matrices can be converted into fixed-denominator evidence states.
Pass, fail, invalid-submission, infrastructure, missing, and blocked evidence are not interchangeable.
Existing M1.1, M2, unsafe triage, and gold-patch smoke artifacts can be consumed without new live model calls.

fixed_denominator.denominator_policy: fixed across all ACUTs; ACUT-specific failures do not shrink the denominator
fixed_denominator.formula: G_score = 100 * sum(resolved_i) / 6 after any pre-run global-infra replacements
